_note: 26 features: 10 covered + 2 Ring0 + 12 Ring1 + 14 deferred. All MVP features covered after auto-fix.
_stress_test_observations: SCALE: 26 features is 2x petmart (10) — LLM must process more features but logic is the same
CLOSURE DENSITY: 12 Ring1 closures from 12 MVP features — nearly 1:1 ratio shows that at Amazon scale, closures are the dominant gap type
CROSS-DOMAIN: closures span 5 different backend services — Step 3.5 must trace across microservice boundaries
MODULE-NODE MISMATCH: svc-review and svc-message exist in modules but had no implementation nodes — common LLM oversight in microservice projects
CONVERGENCE: no Ring 2+ gaps needed (all 14 are post_launch features, not derived). The 3 convergence rules work: concept boundary limits scope, all closures are Ring 1, no scale reversal
